author: codex

patch.value: Fixes CHANGELOG.md generated by CI having plain (pmc-xxx) references instead of clickable links. Three call sites updated: generate+step-summary, check, and release-notes.
Add --item-url-base to release.yml changelog generation steps

The release workflow ran node dist/cli.js directly with hardcoded flags that did not include --item-url-base. Updated all three changelog generation calls in release.yml to include --item-url-base so CI produces the same linked format as the local npm run changelog script.
release.yml includes --item-url-base in all three changelog generation calls; CI-generated CHANGELOG.md has clickable links for all pm item IDs.

value.author: codex
value.text: Related to pmc-w906 (--item-url-base feature). CI workflow must mirror the npm run changelog script flags.

value.author: codex
value.text: Discovered after v2026.05.24-7 CI release: CHANGELOG showed plain IDs not links because workflow did not have --item-url-base.

value.author: codex
value.text: When adding new CLI flags to npm scripts, always audit CI workflow files for hardcoded node dist/cli.js calls that bypass npm scripts and need manual update.

message: CI workflow was generating CHANGELOG.md without --item-url-base, producing plain-text item IDs instead of clickable links.

patch.value: Added --item-url-base to all three node dist/cli.js calls in .github/workflows/release.yml.
CI-generated CHANGELOG.md has clickable item ID links; release.yml check step passes.
release.yml updated; npm run changelog:check passes locally confirming format is consistent.
All three changelog generation calls in release.yml updated with --item-url-base; CI will produce linked CHANGELOG on next run.
